overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a rural dirt path during a stormy night. The scene features dramatic lighting with moonlight breaking through storm clouds, wooden fences lining the path, and a tense atmosphere as lightning strikes in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rural path with stone wall transitioning to wooden fence

events.description: stone wall on right side transitions to wooden split-rail fence

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with swords strapped to his back, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: rough stone wall running alongside the right edge of the path
weathered wooden split-rail fence lining the left side of the path
muddy dirt trail with grass growing in the center
tall green grass and vegetation surrounding the path
dark storm clouds covering the night sky with occasional moonlight

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path bordered by a stone wall on the right and a wooden fence on the left. The atmosphere is dark and stormy with heavy cloud cover. Around the 8-second mark, the stone wall gives way to a matching wooden fence, creating an enclosed corridor effect as the path continues into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding dirt trail enclosed by wooden fences on both sides

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the fenced path with steady gait, swords visible on back

entered.detail: split-rail wooden fence appearing on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path becomes fully enclosed by wooden split-rail fences on both sides, creating a corridor through the grassy countryside. The storm clouds continue to dominate the sky with minimal moonlight filtering through. The path curves gently as Geralt maintains a steady walking pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland path with moonlight breaking through storm clouds

events.description: moonlight breaks through storm clouds creating dramatic illumination on the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through more open countryside with only the right fence remaining

entered.detail: expansive open fields of tall grass replacing the enclosed fence line on the left

segments.scene_description: The landscape opens up as the left fence disappears, revealing expansive grasslands. The sky becomes more visible with dramatic moonlight breaking through the storm clouds, creating a cinematic lighting effect on the path. The right fence continues alongside as the terrain becomes more open and exposed.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural crossroads approaching wooden signpost under stormy sky

events.description: wooden signpost becomes visible at the upcoming path intersection
bright lightning flash illuminates the storm clouds and surrounding landscape

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching a crossroads with a wooden signpost visible ahead, continuing forward as lightning strikes

entered.detail: weathered wooden signpost with directional markers at the path intersection
dark dense tree line visible beyond the crossroads

segments.scene_description: As Geralt approaches a rural crossroads, a wooden signpost becomes visible in the distance marking the intersection. The storm intensifies with a dramatic lightning flash illuminating the dark clouds around the 53-second mark. The right fence recedes into the mid-ground as the path widens approaching the junction with the dense forest visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural path that transforms from a narrow, enclosed corridor into an expansive, storm-swept landscape. It begins with Geralt walking between a stone wall and a wooden fence under a heavy, dark sky, as the stone wall gradually gives way to a matching wooden fence that hems in the path. As the camera follows the gentle curve of the road, the scene opens up when the left fence disappears, revealing wide grasslands illuminated by dramatic moonlight breaking through the storm clouds. The environment then shifts toward a rural crossroads, where the right fence recedes into the mid-ground and the path widens. Finally, a sudden flash of lightning illuminates the dark clouds and a distant wooden signpost just as the path leads toward a dense, looming forest.
